arguments.argument:
if other.type=0 //Stop { xVel=0 } else if other.type=1 //Jump { y-=2 jumpAcc=other.jumpAcc yVel=jumpAcc } else if other.type=10 //Teleport { var tEffect; tEffect=instance_create(x,y-20,oEffect) tEffect.sprite_index=sEfEnergyRip; tEffect.followID=-1; tEffect.xFollow=0; tEffect.yFollow=0 tEffect.newBlend=1; tEffect.decay=-100; tEffect.xSpd=0; tEffect.ySpd=0; tEffect.image_alpha=0.75 tEffect.image_xscale=0.75; tEffect.image_yscale=0.75; tEffect.image_speed=0.5 x=other.myX y=other.myY xVel=0 tEffect=instance_create(x,y-20,oEffect) tEffect.sprite_index=sEfEnergyRip; tEffect.followID=-1; tEffect.xFollow=0; tEffect.yFollow=0 tEffect.newBlend=1; tEffect.decay=-100; tEffect.xSpd=0; tEffect.ySpd=0; tEffect.image_alpha=0.75 tEffect.image_xscale=0.75; tEffect.image_yscale=0.75; tEffect.image_speed=0.5 slightWaitAfterTele=20 }
with other {instance_destroy()}
